name: TerraGroup Project 'KLU-K-416'
description:
Scheiße, I spent half a decade as a workshop project to end up here?!?

Art by MichaeliaDalto9 on X

Tarkov is the hyper-violent lawless home of some... Even more so hyper-violent parties. Between the warring PMC's hailing from West and East, the scared shitless scavengers inbetween, the megacorporation with some SERIOUS allegations to confess on the world stage, and the cultists who believed that this was humanity's ultimate fate, you'd think a fully functioning autonomous killing machine would be the least of the oddities here.

Klukai here is said autonomous killing machine, made in Germany at the behest of TerraGroup, she is the pinnacle of robotics... And has the attitude of one at such heights, because as it would appear, she has been equipped with a disturbingly human artificial mind, emulating everything down to even feelings of pain, anxiety, and every other plight humanity has!

Oh and USEC isn't USEC here it's TGOSC, since I couldn't find the meaning of USEC as an acronym.

HK416!!!!!! Yeah this is my interpretation of Tarkov and this art was just really cool- blah blah blah you know the drill this isn't canon to Tarkov's actual lore... whatever it is, and give me all the feedback you want any way you want.

oh and Sanguine USEC is somewhere on the docket for the near future, I just need to figure out how to write it.

eeyyyy 404 chats
creator: LZQuebec
